title: Compose
description: Adding more building blocks, like polished tuff.
body:
Compose adds more variations of existing blocks that would make sense to have in the game.
These new blocks let you have more variations and designs in your builds and expand your building capabilities.

This mod is for fabric only.

Compose on CurseForge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/compose
